title: Software Engineer, PrismHR (Mar 2025 – present)
text: Muskan currently works at PrismHR as a Software Engineer, since March 2025. This is her current job and employer right now. She engineers HR software at scale: performant Angular UIs, full-stack features, and AI-augmented workflows for enterprise clients.

title: Software Engineer, OnGraph Technologies (Jan 2023 – Mar 2025)
text: At OnGraph Technologies, Muskan was promoted from Software Analyst to Software Engineer in January 2023, in under 12 months — ahead of the typical track. As Software Engineer she led frontend modules, built AI-integrated pipelines, and mentored teammates, working in Angular, TypeScript, NgRx, and Node.js.

title: Software Analyst, OnGraph Technologies (May–Jul 2022)
text: Muskan joined OnGraph Technologies as a Software Analyst in May 2022, mid-degree, and shipped production Angular features within weeks. Stack: Angular, TypeScript, enterprise apps.

title: MCA, AI & Data Science — Poornima University (2021–2023)
text: For her master's degree, Muskan studied Master of Computer Applications (MCA) at Poornima University, specialization in Artificial Intelligence & Data Science, CGPA 8.9/10. Two-time gold medalist — highest scorer across the entire program.

title: BCA + design/teaching internships — St. Xavier's College, Jaipur (2018–2021)
text: Bachelor of Computer Applications at St. Xavier's College, Jaipur. In parallel, Muskan completed a graphic design internship at Incmink Co. and a teaching internship at an NGO — the source of her design eye and communication skills.

title: Frontend skills
text: Frontend stack: Angular (Advanced), AngularJS, TypeScript, JavaScript (ES6+), RxJS, NgRx, Angular CLI, HTML5, CSS3, SCSS, Bootstrap, responsive design, Syncfusion, ChartJS, ExcelJS. NgRx state management at scale is part of her core, production stack.

title: Backend skills
text: Backend stack: Node.js, NestJS, Express.js, .NET, RESTful APIs, WebSockets, Socket.io. Databases: MongoDB, MySQL, SQL.

title: AI & automation skills
text: AI stack: LLM APIs (Claude, OpenAI), GitHub Copilot, prompt engineering, AI agent development, agentic workflows, multi-agent systems, LLM integration, RAG pipelines, eval harnesses. Also: Azure (AZ-900), Azure AI (AI-900), CI/CD pipelines, Docker.

title: Promoted in under a year
text: Recognized for exceptional performance and promoted from Software Analyst to Software Engineer at OnGraph Technologies in under 12 months, well ahead of the typical track.

title: AI Sprint Accelerator
text: Designed and orchestrated multi-agent AI workflows that handled 40% of sprint-level tasks autonomously at OnGraph, while maintaining over 90% project accuracy.

title: Polyglot language contributor
text: Contributed to the design and implementation of a programming language with components written in Rust, Python, Go, JavaScript, C#, and C++ — a full-spectrum engineering challenge, collaborating with a senior Google engineer on a Rust-based compiler.

title: Angular Champion
text: Internal recognition for building reusable Angular component libraries adopted across 3 separate client projects, saving weeks of duplicated work per quarter. Published as versioned, tree-shakeable internal npm packages.

title: ClauseLens — RAG pipeline for contracts
text: ClauseLens is Muskan's open-source hybrid-retrieval RAG pipeline for contract intelligence: structural chunking, BM25 + dense vector fusion via Reciprocal-Rank Fusion, and citation-validated answers — every answer is rejected and retried if its citations don't verify. 90.7% hit-rate@8 on a 43-question golden set, 1.5ms mean retrieval latency, 100% of answers carry citations. Live demo with recorded pipeline runs at /systems/, source at github.com/itsmuskanagarwal/clauselens-rag.

title: effective-agents-lab
text: effective-agents-lab implements Anthropic's 'Building Effective AI Agents' playbook end to end: 13 pattern/agent modules, an eval harness, and a 13-chapter learning guide, backed by 206 offline tests.

title: Other open-source projects
text: Muskan maintains 10+ public repositories, including review-rails (PR review automation for GitHub Actions — deterministic checks first, LLM judgment only where rules can't reach), memory-matrix (a Claude skill that scans legacy codebases into durable inventories with file:line evidence), ng-reaper (finds and deletes provably dead code in Angular apps, including NgRx), agent-pipe (a typed, composable TypeScript pipeline library for multi-step LLM workflows), and ng-perf-lens (a Chrome DevTools extension surfacing Angular change-detection cost live).

title: Engineering writing
text: Muskan publishes near-daily engineering writing: AI agents, retrieval systems, Angular performance, and honest build logs — on the site's /articles/ and on Medium at medium.com/@developerwhoismean.

title: Contact & availability
text: Muskan is open to interesting full-stack challenges, AI-adjacent frontend work, and teams building things where AI output has to be verifiable. Her email address for contact is hello@muskanagarwal.dev, linkedin.com/in/itsmuskanagarwal, github.com/itsmuskanagarwal, and medium.com/@developerwhoismean.

title: Blueprint portfolio — five verticals
text: Beyond ClauseLens (built and open-sourced), Muskan has fully specified — architecture, costs, pricing, go-to-market — four more RAG verticals queued for build: AuditLoom (SOC 2 / ISO 27001 compliance evidence reasoning), BidForge (RFP and security-questionnaire drafting), AuthPilot (healthcare prior-auth policy tracking), and LedgerScope (financial filings and covenant intelligence).

title: About Muskan
text: Muskan Agarwal is a Frontend Engineer who ships full-stack: she architects Angular SPAs, builds Node.js backends, and integrates AI agent pipelines. Her design eye and communication skills trace back to a graphic-design internship and an NGO teaching internship she did alongside her BCA.

title: Enterprise client work (NDA)
text: Muskan has worked on production applications generating millions in annual revenue — SaaS platforms, government systems, and enterprise Angular apps spanning finance, HR, and public sector. Specific client project details are kept confidential per NDA.
